title: carex elata subsp. omskiana
intro: Carex elata subsp. omskiana, also known as Omsk sedge, is a subspecies of the Carex elata plant, belonging to the family Cyperaceae, which is a type of grass-like perennial plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex elata subsp. omskiana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to promote healing and well-being.
